steps.t: The Boar of Everholt is nearby. The Boar's trail leads to the north, towards the sound of running water.
Follow the scent of the Boar of Everholt.
The Boar of Everholt is very close. You should approach the great creature quietly.
The Boar of Everholt has sustained grave injuries and is heading towards the stream. Follow the Boar of Everholt to ensure that you have finally defea…
